tasks.name: Environment Setup
tasks.description: Install LIBERO benchmark, robomimic dependencies, and set up data pipeline. Download LIBERO-10 demonstration datasets. Verify GPU access and training loop with a 1-epoch smoke test.

pilot.pass_criteria: Training loop completes without error; 1-epoch loss decreases

tasks.name: Phase 0: Pilot Feasibility Check
tasks.description: Train 10-task joint model and 5-task subset model (tasks 0-4 only, volume-controlled upsampling). Compare per-task success rates to detect measurable performance differences. Gate: if all task deltas < 3%, switch benchmark.

pilot.pass_criteria: At least 1 task shows >5% success rate difference between 10-task and 5-task models

visualizations.description: Per-task success rate comparison: 10-task vs 5-task models

tasks.name: Phase 1a: Train Full 10-Task Baseline (5 seeds)
tasks.description: Train the full LIBERO-10 joint model with uniform mixing across 5 random seeds. This is the baseline for C-LOTO computation. Evaluate 200 rollouts per task per seed.

pilot.pass_criteria: All 5 seeds converge; mean success rate > 30% across tasks

visualizations.description: Per-task success rates across 5 seeds (mean +/- std)

tasks.name: Phase 1b: C-LOTO Leave-One-Out Training (10 configs x 5 seeds)
tasks.description: For each of the 10 tasks, train a leave-one-out model excluding that task with volume-controlled upsampling. 5 seeds each = 50 training runs. Evaluate 200 rollouts per task per seed. Compute transfer effect matrix Delta_j^(i) with paired t-tests and Bonferroni correction.
tasks.note_over_60min: 50 training runs (10 LOO configs x 5 seeds) with 200 rollouts each. Parallelized across 4 GPUs but volume is inherently large for statistical rigor. Each individual run is ~5 min.

pilot.pass_criteria: At least 3 task pairs show Delta > 0 at p < 0.05 after Bonferroni correction; OR clear signal that negative transfer is absent (pivot to alternative hypothesis)

visualizations.description: 10x10 C-LOTO transfer effect matrix
Statistically significant negative transfer pairs with effect sizes

tasks.name: Phase 1c: Single-Task Baselines (10 tasks x 1 seed)
tasks.description: Train each LIBERO-10 task independently as an upper bound for no-interference performance. 1 seed each, 200 rollouts evaluation. Used to contextualize C-LOTO results.

pilot.pass_criteria: All 10 single-task models converge; provides upper bound reference

visualizations.description: Single-task vs multi-task success rates

tasks.name: Phase 2a: BCS Computation
tasks.description: Compute Bottleneck Conflict Score for all 90 task pairs. Extract task-conditioned activations at the last shared layer, compute top-20 PCA subspace overlap and linear probe readout alignment. Gradient-free, runs on frozen trained model.

pilot.pass_criteria: BCS values show non-trivial variance (std > 0.1); overlap and alignment components are individually informative

visualizations.description: Subspace overlap vs readout alignment colored by C-LOTO transfer sign
10x10 BCS score matrix

tasks.name: Phase 2b: GPTA Computation
tasks.description: Compute Gradient-Projected Task Affinity using LESS-style random projection (k=512). Collect per-sample gradient features for all demonstrations, compute max-cosine aggregation between task pairs. Requires backpropagation through the trained model.

pilot.pass_criteria: GPTA matrix computed without OOM; influence values show non-trivial variance

visualizations.description: 10x10 GPTA influence matrix

tasks.name: Phase 2c: GradCos and Other Proxies
tasks.description: Compute remaining 3 proxies: (1) GradCos -- cosine of per-task mean gradients; (2) RepFinger -- multi-layer CKA + readout direction; (3) Kernel Surrogate -- EK-FAC second-order attribution. All operate on the trained baseline model.

pilot.pass_criteria: All 3 proxy matrices computed; at least one shows Spearman rho > 0.3 with BCS

tasks.name: Phase 2d: Proxy vs. C-LOTO Benchmark
tasks.description: Correlate all 5 proxy influence vectors against C-LOTO ground truth Delta vector. Compute Spearman rho, Kendall tau, and sign agreement rate. Run seed stability audit: recompute proxies with 5 base model seeds, measure ranking stability.

pilot.pass_criteria: Best proxy achieves Spearman rho > 0.6 against C-LOTO ground truth

visualizations.description: Proxy benchmark: 5 proxies x correlation metrics
Predicted influence (best proxy) vs observed C-LOTO effect

tasks.name: Phase 3a: BCS Mechanism Decomposition
tasks.description: For the top-3 detected negative transfer pairs, decompose BCS into subspace overlap and readout conflict components. Test whether high overlap + low readout alignment predicts negative transfer (H3). Compute gradient conflict cosines for the same pairs.

pilot.pass_criteria: BCS decomposition explains >30% variance in C-LOTO Delta values

visualizations.description: BCS decomposition: overlap x alignment vs transfer effect

tasks.name: Phase 3b: Architecture vs. Data Ablation
tasks.description: Compare 4 configurations (5 seeds each): (1) shared model + uniform, (2) shared model + influence-guided mixing (best proxy), (3) per-task LoRA + uniform, (4) per-task LoRA + influence-guided. Evaluate in-distribution and OOD. Tests H5 and delineates when each approach is preferred.
tasks.note_over_60min: 4 configs x 5 seeds = 20 training runs + evaluation. Parallelized across 4 GPUs. Each run ~5 min + eval time.

pilot.pass_criteria: All 4 configurations train and evaluate successfully; per-task LoRA serves as a meaningful upper bound

visualizations.description: Architecture ablation: 4 configs x mean success rate
Architecture ablation full results

tasks.name: Phase 3c: Instance-Level Clustering
tasks.description: Compute gradient features for all demonstrations across 10 tasks. k-means clustering (k=5, 10, 20) on gradient features. Measure silhouette score for task labels vs. emergent clusters. Tests H7: whether demonstrations cluster by manipulation primitive rather than task label.

pilot.pass_criteria: Clustering completes; silhouette score for task labels < 0.7 (implying cross-task structure exists)

visualizations.description: t-SNE of gradient features colored by task vs. emergent cluster

tasks.name: Phase 3d: Ecological Stability Analysis
tasks.description: Compute eigenvalue spectrum of the 10x10 influence matrix. Check May stability criterion sigma(M) * sqrt(T * C) > 1. Identify dominant positive eigenvector as 'axis of conflict'. Compute frustration index for task triplets. Tests H8.

pilot.pass_criteria: Eigenvalue spectrum computed; at least one positive eigenvalue identified

visualizations.description: Eigenvalue spectrum of influence matrix with May stability threshold

tasks.name: Phase 4a: Uniform Mixing Baseline (5 seeds)
tasks.description: Full training with uniform mixing weights w_i = 1/10. This is likely the same as cloto_baseline but with standardized evaluation including OOD protocol. 5 seeds, 200 rollouts in-distribution + 200 rollouts OOD per task.

pilot.pass_criteria: OOD evaluation pipeline works; baseline success rates are reasonable

visualizations.description: Uniform mixing per-task results (in-dist + OOD)

tasks.name: Phase 4b: Influence-Guided Mixing (5 seeds)
tasks.description: Solve minimax LP using best proxy's influence matrix to get optimal mixing weights. Train with influence-guided weights. 5 seeds, 200 rollouts in-dist + 200 rollouts OOD. This is the key experimental condition testing H4.

pilot.pass_criteria: LP solver produces valid mixing weights; training converges; success rate improvement >= 3% over uniform

visualizations.description: Optimized mixing weights per task

tasks.name: Phase 4c: Re-Mix DRO Baseline (5 seeds)
tasks.description: Implement Re-Mix distributionally robust optimization over task weights. Train with DRO-optimized weights. 5 seeds, 200 rollouts in-dist + 200 rollouts OOD.

pilot.pass_criteria: DRO optimization converges; trained model produces valid success rates

tasks.name: Phase 4d: Per-Task LoRA Baseline (5 seeds)
tasks.description: Train separate LoRA adapters for each of the 10 tasks on a shared backbone. 5 seeds, 200 rollouts in-dist + 200 rollouts OOD. Uses oracle task routing (task identity known at inference).

pilot.pass_criteria: Per-task LoRA models train and evaluate successfully; provides upper bound for task isolation

tasks.name: Phase 4e: Final Mixing Strategy Comparison
tasks.description: Aggregate results from all 4 mixing strategies. Compute mean/worst-case success rates for in-dist and OOD. Statistical tests for pairwise strategy comparisons (paired t-test with Bonferroni). Generate all final paper tables and figures.

pilot.pass_criteria: Influence-guided mixing improves >= 5% over uniform on in-dist evaluation

visualizations.description: Main results: 4 strategies x evaluation protocols
Per-task improvement of influence-guided vs uniform

tasks.name: Transferability: BCS on OpenVLA-7B
tasks.description: Compute BCS on frozen OpenVLA-7B for LIBERO-10 tasks (no retraining needed). Compare BCS rankings between 5M ResNet+MLP model and 7B OpenVLA. Spearman correlation of rankings validates diagnostic generalizability to large VLAs.
tasks.note: OpenVLA-7B requires ~14GB for inference only. 2 GPUs for headroom; no training involved.

pilot.pass_criteria: BCS computable on OpenVLA-7B; Spearman rho of BCS rankings between 5M and 7B models > 0.4

visualizations.description: BCS rankings: 5M model vs 7B OpenVLA
